text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking by the dance studio when I see Narita
Top Road practicing vigorously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... That was terrible! But I'm not giving up yet! Okay, one more time!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Oh! Class Rep! Thank goodness I found you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Whoa! What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
It's b-b-bad! Real bad! C'mon, hurry! Everyone
needs you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Uh oh. This must be a real emergency. Okay, lead
the way!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Okay! And... oh! Could you come too? Having an
adult around would make us feel a lot better!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Is everything okay?!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Class Rep! You came! And you even brought a
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
What a relief... Now we'll actually have a fighting
chance at passing tomorrow's makeup exam!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry! I was in such a rush that I forgot to
explain the situation...
choice_data_list:
And here I thought something terrible had
happened...

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: But this is terrible, and we need your help! Please help us study! We're done for otherwise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind sticking around, but Narita Top Road
was in the middle of dance practice. I look her
way worriedly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hehe... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm so relieved. I thought someone had gotten
hurt or something! I'm so glad it was nothing
serious.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'd be happy to help with your studies.
I'm a strict teacher, though, so be prepared to
work hard!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! You're a lifesaver!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's fine. I can practice whenever. What about
you, though? Do you have the time?
choice_data_list: I've got nothing planned, so I can help.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Let's split up the work. First, we need to get a
grasp on what we're dealing with and determine
what will be on the test tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Next, we'll analyze the situation, figure out what
they don't understand, and tackle everything
they're struggling with!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone. Time to get serious! Let's get
you all passing scores tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to know how the makeup exam went,
so I visit the students' classroom the next day.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Yessss! I passed! Thank you so much! You really
saved us!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! You made everything so easy to
understand! We would've been goners without
you, Top Road!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. All I did was help. You're the ones who
put in all the work!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi! And yeah, she really is! Top Road's so
good at everything—school, dancing, races... but
she's so humble about it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Aw, you're exaggerating!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But thank you! I'm just really glad I was able to
help you all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road smiles brightly. She's the picture
of a model student!
